title: BEM-1292 template validator
objective:
Create file governance/validators/validate_disabled_workflow_template.py with content from pathlib import Path

TEMPLATE = Path('governance/workflows_disabled/governance-validation-ci.template.yml')
ACTIVE = Path('.github/workflows/governance-validation-ci.yml')

REQUIRED = [
    'name: governance-validation-ci',
    'on:',
    'push:',
    'pull_request:',
    'jobs:',
    'runs-on: ubuntu-latest',
    'python governance/validators/validate_foundation_all.py',
    'python governance/tests/run_bem1284_minimal_governance_loop.py',
    'python governance/tests/run_bem1285_ci_e2e_capture.py',
]
FORBIDDEN = ['schedule:', 'cron:', 'Release PASS', 'release_pass: true']


def main():
    errors = []
    if not TEMPLATE.exists():
        errors.append('disabled workflow template missing')
    else:
        text = TEMPLATE.read_text(encoding='utf-8')
        for item in REQUIRED:
            if item not in text:
                errors.append(f'missing required template snippet: {item}')
        for item in FORBIDDEN:
            if item in text:
                errors.append(f'forbidden template snippet: {item}')
    if ACTIVE.exists():
        active_text = ACTIVE.read_text(encoding='utf-8')
        if 'jobs:' in active_text or 'runs-on:' in active_text:
            errors.append('active governance workflow must remain neutralized until re-enable gate')
    if errors:
        print('FAIL disabled workflow template validator')
        for error in errors:
            print(error)
        raise SystemExit(1)
    print('PASS disabled workflow template validator')

if __name__ == '__main__':
    main()
